results.rendered_html: bhūrja—kaṇṭaka m. a man of one of the mixed classes (the son of an out-caste Brāhman by a woman of the name tribe),  Mn. x, 21  (v.l. bhūtya-kaṇṭaka and bhṛjja-k˚; cf. bhṛjya-kaṇṭa).
